text: Artificial intelligence is changing many parts of our lives, but it also brings important ethical questions. One major concern is bias. If an AI is trained on data that contains unfair patterns, it can make biased decisions, for example in hiring or lending. This is why fairness is crucial. AI systems must treat all groups equally. Another key issue is privacy. AI often uses large amounts of personal data, so developers must protect people's information carefully. Transparency is also vital. People should understand how AI makes decisions. Finally, responsible AI development means checking for problems and involving diverse voices. By focusing on these ideas, we can create AI that is helpful and ethical for everyone.
